attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-09T05:13:55Z
dispatched_by: mayor

Steps 8-9 of actual cr implementation. (8) Create src/cli/commands/cr/lenses.rs with ReviewerLens enum (8 lenses), build_lens_prompt(lens, diff, adrs) prompt builder following template from Section 5, run_parallel_reviews() using tokio::JoinSet for 8 concurrent LLM calls via runner.run_raw_json(). Each lens prompt includes role description, ADR policies, diff stats, commit messages, full diff. (9) Create src/cli/commands/cr/synthesis.rs with synthesize_cross_lens() - the 9th LLM call. Given all 8 reviews + aggregated result, identify convergent (3+ lenses), divergent (disagreements), surprising (unique insights), most_relevant (top 3). Uses build_synthesis_prompt() and cross-lens synthesis JSON schema. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 5, 9.
title: CR Lenses & Synthesis

description:
attached_molecule: ac-wisp-9o2m
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-09T04:53:37Z
dispatched_by: mayor

Step 7 of actual cr implementation. Extend TailoringRunner trait in src/runner/subprocess.rs with run_raw_json<T: DeserializeOwned>(prompt, schema, model_override, max_budget_usd) -> Result<T>. Default impl returns error. Implement for CliClaudeRunner (uses --json-schema, parses structured_output from ClaudeEnvelope<T>). Implement for AnthropicApiRunner (uses forced tool call pattern with tool_choice: {type: tool, name: return_result}, tool input schema = lens review schema, deserializes tool input as T). Add InvocationOptions::for_review() in src/runner/options.rs: max_turns=1, no tools, skip_permissions=true. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 10.
title: CR Runner Extension: run_raw_json()

description:
attached_molecule: ac-wisp-dw4lj
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-09T22:22:34Z
dispatched_by: mayor

Some tests hang because they launch the TUI and never finish. Need a 5-second timeout on every CLI/TUI launch in tests to prevent indefinite hangs.

This blocks polecat productivity — chrome is currently waiting on test results that may be hanging.

Fix: Add a 5s timeout wrapper around all test invocations that spawn the CLI/TUI process. Tests that exceed the timeout should fail with a clear message rather than hang forever.
title: Tests hang on TUI launch — add 5s timeout to all CLI/TUI test invocations

attached_molecule: ac-wisp-jai5

attached_at: 2026-03-09T05:12:28Z

Steps 4-5 of actual cr implementation. (4) Create src/cli/commands/cr/diff.rs with gather_diff(base) -> Result<DiffContext>. Runs git diff base...HEAD, git diff base...HEAD --stat, git log base..HEAD --oneline, gets current commit SHA. Error if base branch doesn't exist or no changes. (5) Create src/cli/commands/cr/adr_reader.rs with read_adr_context(root_dir) -> Result<AdrContext>. Reuses find_existing_output_files() from sync/adr_utils.rs, extract_managed_content(), extract_adr_sections(), strip_managed_metadata() from generation/markers.rs. Warns if no ADR content found but continues with empty context. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 4 Phase 1-2, 11.
title: CR Git Diff & ADR Reader

Steps 10-11 of actual cr implementation. (10) Create src/cli/commands/cr/display.rs with render_signal_matrix() using Panel builder from src/cli/ui/panel.rs. Signal icons (RED/YLW/GRN/N/A), per-lens rationale, overall signal + decision, cross-lens synthesis summary. Verbose mode: each Yellow/Red finding gets own panel with evidence, files, ADRs, suggestion. JSON mode: serialize full AggregatedResult to stdout. (11) Create src/cli/commands/cr/pipeline.rs with run_review(args, runner) orchestrating all 6 phases sequentially. Wire into mod.rs exec() with runner resolution following sync_wiring.rs pattern. Exit codes: Green=0, Yellow=0, Red=1, Error=2. Write review record to .actual/cr-reviews/ as timestamped JSON. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 13, 14, 15, 17.
title: CR Display, Pipeline & Wiring

description:
All 8 CR lenses fail with 'Prompt is too long' when the diff is large (255KB in this case). The full raw diff is embedded inline in the lens prompt (lenses.rs:92-137) and passed as a -p CLI argument (subprocess.rs:692-693). Claude Code's --print -p mode has a prompt length limit that this exceeds.

Fix: Cap diff_text to ~100KB in build_lens_prompt(). When truncated, append a note with total size. Consider also stripping binary diffs and large generated files before truncation.

Key files:
- src/cli/commands/cr/lenses.rs (build_lens_prompt)
- src/cli/commands/cr/pipeline.rs (gather_diff)

Repro: cargo run -- cr --base main (on poc/actual_cr branch with 4299 insertions)
title: CR: Prompt too long — truncate diff before sending to Claude CLI

Steps 6 and 12 of actual cr implementation. (6) Create src/cli/commands/cr/aggregation.rs with aggregate_signals(reviews) -> AggregatedResult. Pure deterministic function: any Red -> Red, Security/SRE Red auto-blocks, 3+ Yellow escalates to Red, any Yellow -> Yellow, else Green. Signal::to_decision() mapping. (12) Add error variants to src/error.rs: CodeReviewError(String), NoDiffFound{base}, LensFailure{lens, message}, SynthesisFailure(String). Error recovery: NoDiffFound exits 0, single LensFailure continues as Gray, 3+ LensFailure aborts, SynthesisFailure reports without synthesis. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 8, 16.
title: CR Aggregation & Error Variants
